title: tithymalus riae
intro: Tithymalus riae, also known as Euphorbia riae, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its unique, succulent stems and leaves. The medicinal properties of Tithymalus riae lie in its sap, which contains a milky latex containing euphorbin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential use in treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and combating bacterial infections. Tithymalus riae can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or by applying its latex topically, although more research is needed to fully understand its applications and potential risks.
